Title: Good Fit, but Slightly See-Through
Author: Tracy
View: Reviewed in the United States on October 7, 2024
View1:
I purchased the Amazon Essentials Women’s Skinny Jean in white, and while I love the fit and comfort, I did notice that they’re a bit see-through. The jeans are soft and stretchy, making them very comfortable for all-day wear, and the high-waisted design is flattering. However, you’ll definitely want to wear nude or light-colored undergarments because the white fabric is somewhat sheer, especially in brighter light.

Aside from that, the quality is good, and they wash well without shrinking. If you’re okay with a bit of transparency, they’re a great pair of jeans at a reasonable price!

Title: Dark Rinse not Black, Sizing is totally off
Author: dbh
View: Reviewed in the United States on November 29, 2023
View1: Changed my review rating after trying these jeans again.  I had originally ordered these jeans in Black Rinse - while I tried that twice they are dark blue and not at all Black.  I decided to keep them though since I liked their fit.  A year later I went to order them again trying to get the Black Rinse again.  Nope, still Blue, plus they the same size And i could not even close the zipper!  I returned these.  On the last sale I decided to size up and thinking although they didn't have the Black Rinse in 10s, maybe they did in 12s.......turns out no they are still blue..........and also I can't even close the 12S...........this is a full size up from what I really wear when shopping , at least with the Kohls Sonoma Jeans and a size up from what I have worn with the Amazon jeans.  I goofed though with my Amazon jeans and put them in the dryer which I also started doing with my Sonoma jeans.  Turns out the Amazon jeans shrink in the dryer so now I can't even wear the pairs i had ordered a year ago.  I am still wearing Sonoma jeans purchased years ago........so I can't say my size has changed.  Really disappointed because when the Amazon jeans did fit, they were soft and basically like leggings but with back pockets which I prefer to have.  Amazon You really should remove the color of Black Rinse or perhaps you have them in some sizes but not all..........in which case that should be changed.  for now, it's back to Kohls for me , that is, if i want new jeans.I like the jeans I received but these are not Black as I had ordered.  I believe they are the Dark Rinse.  Do I risk trying to order again in the color I wanted?  also the size Amazon suggests for me would never have worked - the size 10 however did.  Snug on first try but with a nice stretch and no doubt will losen up with wear.after washing and wearing these , I found they feel more like leggings than a pair of jeans. I think they look (or mentally feel) better wearing a longer top than a regular top length.  ordered another pair and they were also dark rinse so if you are looking for a black in 10short you may find as I did - they seem to be out or a batch is labeled incorrectly.

Title: Very comfortable...but they stink!
Author: Manda Reviews ♠️
View: Reviewed in the United States on March 4, 2020
View1: I think I’m giving these a 3.5, I went back and forth with the star rating. These are very comfortable pants. I wasn’t sure whether to go with the 0 or the 2, and the short or the regular. I’m 5’3.5” and my go-to Jean is a size 1 in Celebrity Pink. I ordered the Size 0 Regular. They seemed a tad long for me (I think I like the shorter length on me in tighter jeans) but they were perfect with rolled cuffs. They are definitely more of a relaxed look than I am used to. The legs were looser. I liked the rise and it was high enough to contain everything but I don’t think it gave me a flat butt the way some high-waist jeans do. Great lighter color. I think I would have preferred the shorter length, but with the looseness of the pants I’m not sure that would’ve looked better. So I’m ultimately glad I went with the 0R. If you are on the smaller side of a size 0, you may find these too big, but that’s what free returns are for. The thing is these pants STINK. They smell so bad. It’s like formaldehyde meets moth balls. I thought after a wash the smell would be gone but nope! These still wreaked after a wash. I’m not going to return them and hope that a few more washes will get the smell out, but if you’re sensitive to that, I’d skip these pants.

View: Reviewed in the United States on January 7, 2023

Months later: Ended up returning these. The tug of war between my waist and backside was exhausting.

Title: Super inconsistent sizing! AWFUL quality fabric.
Author: /\mazon Customer
View: Reviewed in the United States on July 23, 2020
View1:
UPDATE: ugh. just look at the new photos. Changing to 1-star. Do NOT recommend. After a few months, I’ve found that these jeans are total garbage. They are droopy and unflattering, and the material quality is extremely poor. Even freshly washed, they never un-bag. The elastic in the fabric buckles out or pulls in weird looking strips in multiple places, and it doesn’t even smooth out after putting them on. TERRIBLE! Wish I never bought them, even at my insanely cheap price.

Overall: Meh. I would have returned these if they were at what appears to be the very reasonable sounding full price.
- Material is very stretchy, but a bit thin. Nice for summer, but you can catch some VPL even through the dark wash.
- Inseam length runs short. I wear flats and almost always have to get short lengths for a 30" inseam, but the short of these hit in an awkward spot above my ankle bone.
- The listing didn't specify, but these are pretty high cut. They hit right at my belly button.
- Butt pockets are higher than I expected, but not too 90s looking.

I bought a pair of these in 2 short. Initial fit seemed just okay, but for the very low price I decided to grab a second identical pair in case I ended up loving them after a few wears. Turns out... They are clearance priced for a reason!

In the photos, you can see two pairs of the same jean- same exact size, same exact color, but cut at least a size differently. The waists have about 1-2" difference in diameter! Luckily, the material is stretchy enough that the cut too small jeans are just good enough. And the cut is high enough that cut large ones are also just good enough. Neither are great, but for the price I found them at, I'll keep them while I wait for my normal jeans to go on sale (AE jeggings).

I got a 31 and I could honestly barely button them. They would be okay as standing jeans but sitting in these would be another story for me. They are maybe an inch too long as well. I really needed probably a size 33 in the waist which is crazy because they say that’s a size 16! They also come up higher than my belly button although the model in the photo has them coming up below her belly button. I’m not sure if maybe they are hitting my waist too high because I am short or what’s happening. Maybe they need to sit lower on my waist (if they fit) but then they would be extremely too long.

I love the color, I honestly like the way the jeans look on me and I felt like the bagginess wasn’t too much for me. They just didn’t fit me and either came up too high on my body shape or something. Good quality denim just a bad fit for my personal body type

Title: Wowwwww! I love these jeans!
Author: AP
View: Reviewed in the United States on April 5, 2023
View1:
I just had these jeans delivered and after trying them on, I had to immediately take pictures and write a review!

I am about 5’4”, 120-125 lbs and 26” ish waist on a good day / 37” ish hips. I decided to size up and ordered a 6 short (28x28) in Love in the Mist color and I am amazed at how well they fit! The way they hug my body almost feels bespoke, and I’m not sure I have had that experience before. The leg length fits perfectly, and while there is a bit of a gap in the back, it’s not too bad.

I can comfortably squat, kneel, etc. in these jeans and nothing pinches or feels tight at all. This color has some stretch (not sure if all colors do) so I maybe could have gotten a size down (see the picture where I stretch the back gap). I will certainly keep these to wear when I want a casual/cool vibe and may get a smaller size if I want to look more polished.

If you’re on the fence (I know I was), put them on “save for later” and treat yourself when the price is right. You will thank yourself.

Title: Defective seam
Author: s
View: Reviewed in the United States on September 18, 2024
View1: I have these exact jeans in two other colors that fit great.  Unfortunately, the fit is not consistent across colors.  I previously returned a pair in another color that had defective sewing and unfortunately, that's the case again here.  These are the Star Rise color and how they are sewn together creates an awkward bulge of excess fabric on the side, beneath the pocket. I'm not sure why Lee would make this design choice for this color of the jeans, but they did.  It makes the hips look awkward and larger, and that's a look that I imagine meant women will not want.  These jeans are great in some colors, but bad in others.  There is a quality control issue.

Title: Great jean but pants fit differently depending on color which is frustrating
Author: Caitlin
View: Reviewed in the United States on April 8, 2021
View1: Buying jeans is always a trial. When I got these jeans I didn't know what to expect because previous Lee's didn't fit well. As soon as I tried these jeans on I was in love. I'm 5'9 and weight 285. I have an hourglass figure (wide hips and shoulders with a narrower waist). Most pants don't fit my thighs if they fit my hips well but these hugged everything in a flattering and comfortable way. (For this pair of pants I'm referring to the majestic style pants here). I need a pair of work pants so I decided I would order the exact same pair in black because I loved them so much. What a disappointment! They're tight on the waist and when I bend over I can feel them digging into my stomach. There's no way I would be able to sit in these for any extended period. They're literally just the tiniest bit smaller than the first pair I bought and that makes them unwearable for me. The black pants are also really long even though I got the regular length. I got the majestic in the long length (which were too long but I didn't mind) and the black pants in the normal length, but the black pants were nearly the same length! Super disappointed and returning. I would buy the majestic pair again though.

Title: Are they new?
Author: AMZN fan
View: Reviewed in the United States on January 28, 2023
View1:
The jeans are great. Fit well and are slightly stretchy. Look great. The boot cut is just shy of bell bottoms so a bit broad for chucks but will work well with boots (as intended).

My concern is there were ZERO labels or attachments which makes me think they are not new. No wear and tear but no labels, markings, decals or anything that you would find in the store. Title: Too bad about the "saddle bags"
Author: vv
View: Reviewed in the United States on March 28, 2022
View1: I really like everything about Lee jeans except that no matter which version I buy, they ALWAYS seem to have extra fabric on the outside of the thighs for so-called "saddlebags."  Hey! Not all women have these!  I hate the little pockets this extra fabric creates--at times I feel like I'm wearing jodhpurs--and in the past I've even tried to sew them off, which has generally made them look dumb in other ways! Otherwise, these jeans are really nice.  They have a comfortable degree of stretch, the length is just right (I'm 5'3", 130 lbs & ordered a 6 short), the blue color is pretty, & for the price, the quality is pretty good.  I just wish Lee would ditch the extra fabric on the sides--not all women's figures are the same!

Title: Great fit, but….
Author: Kate B
View: Reviewed in the United States on November 7, 2023
View1:
I tried them on, loved the fit and look (they’re even long enough for me at 6 feet tall), removed tags, and set them aside to wear to work two days later.
Put them on this morning and when I pulled them up (no, they’re not snug or in need of any force to get them on) my finger went right through the material! My first thought was that it was just an odd feeling and my finger slipped off the material, but nope, straight through it! I’m not sure if they were already torn and I just didn’t notice because of the tags or something, or if the material was really that weak?!

I’m super sad because they were really cute!
I don’t see much for negative reviews, so maybe I just got a bum pair… once I get my refund, I’ll probably try another and update this review.
